pany.


Today, however. the corporation
counsel was assisted by host OF
corporation lawyers, led by III. M.
Stephens, attorney for the Washing
ton Water Power company, who took
advantage Of every legal phase to
fight the issuance of the writ.


Judge Warren is hearing the case
in place of Judge KEENAN,. This morn
ing the corporation attorneys set up
the plea that franchises are state
property and that a city is merely
acting as an agent for the state; also
that the granting of franchises is a
legislative function and therefore a
function which the people can not
usurp.


1t is believed the gist of the argu-
ment will be turned to the point of
attempting to declare the new law un-
constitutional.


This afternoon is being taken up
with the setting forth of the legal
points.
